chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Hi, our next topic is Strassen's matrix multiplication.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: This topic belongs to divide and conquer. So, Strassen's matrix multiplication follows

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: divide and conquer strategy. First, we will see how matrix

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: multiplication is done normally. Second thing we will see how divide and

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: conquer strategy can be applied for solving matrix multiplication problem.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Then third thing we will see what Strassen has done for improving matrix multiplication

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: using divide and conquer strategy. Let us start with matrix multiplication.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So, I will take some matrices then we will see how multiplication is done.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: I have taken two matrices here A with some elements.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So, the order of this matrix is 2 by 2, 2 cross 2 and this is also 2 cross 2.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: When we multiply two matrices, they can be multiplied if the number of columns of the

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: first matrix are equal to number of rows of second matrix and the resultant matrix

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: will have this dimension. So, the resultant matrix will also be 2 cross 2.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now, this is 2 cross 2, 2 cross 2 matrices. Now, we have to multiply and

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: get the third matrix that is C. How we multiply? This is a simple problem.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Any term of that C matrix that is C of i comma j is obtained by sum of A of ik into B of

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: kj where k takes the values from 1 to this dimension. If you call this as m to n,

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: then this is 1 to n. This is the general form

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: for multiplying two matrices of any dimensions. Here, we are just taking an example of 2 cross

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: 2 matrix. When we want to multiply these two matrices and get the resultant matrix that is C

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: matrix, if I use the general formula and write down the algorithm or a piece of code for multiplying

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: two matrices, let us see how the code looks like. For preparing C matrix, I will take loops

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: for i assign 0, i is less than n, i plus plus. For j assign 0, j is less than n, j plus plus.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Then, third matrix C of i comma j is initialized to 0. Then, for loop k assign values from 0 and

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: k is less than n, k plus plus. And C of i comma j is plus assign with A of i comma k into B of

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: k comma j. Close this loop and this loop and this loop. If I write a simple algorithm for

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: multiplying two matrices, then it will be written like this using three for loops.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: For accessing all the elements of any matrix, we actually require two for loops.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Then here for finding the product each element C11, we obtain it by multiplying all the elements

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: of a row with all the elements of a column. So, for that we require one more loop.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So, that is how it is taking three for loops. What will be the time complexity if three for

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: loops are there? Now, this statement is inside three for loops who are running for n times,

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: then this will be n cube. So, the time taken for multiplying two matrices is order of n cube.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: This is the simple method. Now, let us try to adopt divide and conquer strategy for solving

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: this one. So, let us first observe what we can do such that we can apply divide and conquer strategy.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now, let us see how divide and conquer strategy can be applied for multiplying two matrices.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: In divide and conquer strategy, we say that if the problem is large, we break the problem into

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: sub problems and solve those sub problems, combine the solutions of sub problems to get

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: the solution for main problem. Now, when you say the problem is large, then you should also define

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: what is a small problem. If it is a small problem, we will directly solve it. Anyway, if the problem

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: is large, we will break and break and break at one point, we have to say that this is small and

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: we have to solve it. So, that is why first of all we define a small problem. So, in divide and

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: conquer strategy, which size matrix we should say is small. So, we will say a 2 by 2 that is 2 cross

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: 2 matrix is small. Multiplying 2 cross 2 matrices is small. If there are 2 cross 2, then we will

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: directly solve them. If there are bigger than that larger than that, if the dimensions are 4 by 4 or

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: 8 by 8, any dimension, then we apply divide and conquer strategy that is we break the problem

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: into sub problems. Let us see how to solve a small problem. Already we have here on board

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: two matrices of order 2 by 2, 2 cross 2 and we have to get the resultant matrix after multiplying

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: them. How we can get the terms of C matrix all these terms? Let us prepare them. If I have to

chunks.text: get C 1 1, it can be obtained by multiplying A 1 1 with B 1 1 and A 1 2 with B 2 1. This is the

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: first term this one. Then how to get this term C 1 2? First row second column A 1 1 multiplied with

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: B 1 2 plus A 1 2 multiplied with B 2 2. We got this term. Now, let us see how to get this term.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: That term is obtained by second row first column. C 2 1 is A 2 1 into B 1 1 plus A 2 2 into B 2 1.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now, how to get this term C 2 2 is second row second column A 2 1 into B 1 2 plus A 2 2 into B 2 2.

chunks.title: Strassens Matrix Multiplication - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: That's it. Now, here if the matrices of order 2 cross 2, 2 matrices, then we can multiply them

chunks.text: is 4 unit of time that is constant. If I say no, no multiplications are there, you count them. So,

chunks.text: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8 total 8 multiplications are there that is also constant. 8 is constant.

chunks.text: So, anyhow, these 4 formulas are constant. Now, this is defined as a small problem.

chunks.text: And if you want to reduce the size and say if it is 1 by 1 matrix, then they will be having just

chunks.text: 1 element, I will draw this. A is a 1 1 that is all and B is b 1 1. Then C is a 1 1 into b 1 1.

chunks.text: So, I can say that if the dimensions are less than or equal to 2, then it is a small problem.
